prompt_text:
### Demographics: 69-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Atorvastatin (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 59.8 kg; Height 154.7 cm; BMI 25.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 122/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.6%; 6 months ago 7.5%; 3 months ago 7.1%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 200mg/dL; 9 months ago 179mg/dL; 6 months ago 201mg/dL; 3 months ago 145mg/dL; current 126mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 61.2kg; 9 months ago 58.2kg; 6 months ago 58.8kg; 3 months ago 57.2kg; current 59.8kg), Height (12 months ago 154.7cm; 9 months ago 154.7cm; 6 months ago 154.7cm; 3 months ago 154.7cm; current 154.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 122mmHg; 3 months ago 122mmHg; current 122mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 21U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 29U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 26U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 51mg/g; 9 months ago 51mg/g; 6 months ago 38mg/g; 3 months ago 36mg/g; current 45mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 116mg/dL; 9 months ago 101mg/dL; 6 months ago 118mg/dL; 3 months ago 121mg/dL; current 110mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.6g/dL; 9 months ago 11.7g/dL; 6 months ago 12.3g/dL; 3 months ago 11.6g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
